---
title: "gruppemde_uge_11"
subtitle: "`gruppemde_uge_11`"
description: "gruppemde_uge_11"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/gruppemde_uge_11/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                  | Title                               | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                              |
|---------------------------------------|-------------------------------------|--------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                               | The unique name of the event        | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                       |
| `center`                              | Research center                     | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                    |
| `date_group_meeting_11`               | date_group_meeting_11               | date   | Date for group meeting. Group meeting week 11.                                                                                                           |
| `staff_initials_group_meeting_11`     | staff_initials_group_meeting_11     | string | Initials of the dietitian responsible for conducting the group meeting. Group meeting week 11.                                                           |
| `attended_group_meeting_11`           | attended_group_meeting_11           | string | Indicates participant's attendance to the group meeting. Group meeting week 11.                                                                          |
| `weight_group_meeting_11`             | weight_group_meeting_11             | number | Participant's weight in kilograms, measured with light clothing using the BMI scale in room 1.15. Measured to the nearest 0.1 kg. Group meeting week 11. |
| `carbohydrate_group_group_meeting_11` | carbohydrate_group_group_meeting_11 | string | States if information on assigned carbohydrate group has been provided via Liva. Group meeting 11.                                                       |
| `remarks_group_meeting_11`            | remarks_group_meeting_11            | string | Indicates whether there are any special remarks regarding the participant and what they are. Group meeting week 11.                                      |

: Fields in the `gruppemde_uge_11` resource.
